title: Create More: Vertical Belts
description: A Create addon that adds vertical belts that can move items.
body:
## About
Says what it does on the tin. No longer shall we need to do convoluted ways to move items upwards.

This mod provides sticky and non-sticky variants of belt textures (changable only in the configs)

## Create More Mods
- [Linked Remote](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-linked-remote)
- [Parallel Pipes](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-parallel-pipes)
- [Pipe Bombs in Packages](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-pipe-bombs-in-packages)
- [Package Couriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-package-couriers)
- [Vertical Belts](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-more-vertical-additions)

## Later™
